chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2387 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.21440/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.10282/2021 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 10.09.2021. Mr. Muneeb Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. >>><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel states that the respondents No.7&8, not only harass the petitioner but have also illegally constructed a room in front of the residence of the petitioner, where they run a business of internet and also create hurdles for the people and also used to fight with the residents on petty matters. Learned counsel states that the petitioner has also made a complaint to the SHO Artillery Madan but when no heed was paid, hence the instant petition has been filed. Learned counsel states that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition, if directions are issued to the respondent No.6/SHO Artillery Madan to decide the application /complaint filed by the petitioner in accordance with law. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl. A.G. Sindh present in Court in some other matter waives notice and he has no objection if this petition may be disposed of on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. The instant petition is disposed of by directing the respondent No.6/SHO Artillery Madad to consider the application filed by the petitioner in accordance with law.

Sindh present in Court in some other matter waives notice and he has no objection if this petition may be disposed of on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. The instant petition is disposed of by directing the respondent No.6/SHO Artillery Madad to consider the application filed by the petitioner in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be sent to the concerned SHO for information and compliance. With these directions the instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
